---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a capability or enhancement (feeds the Constellize spec cycle)
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

The gap or need this addresses — who is blocked and how.

## Proposed direction

A rough idea of the change. Implementation follows the Constellize
spec → implement → verify cycle; specs live in `llm/features/`
(index: `llm/features/BACKLOG.md`).

## Scope / governance level

- Backlog category (if known): E- / D- / C- / R- / P- / SM- …
- Rough governance level (L1 architecture / L2 implementation / L3 product) —
  see `docs/governance-delta.md`.

## Notes

Dependencies, alternatives considered, or links to related backlog items.
